nasb.text: Then it turned from Sarid to the east toward the sunrise as far as the border of Chisloth-tabor, and it proceeded to Daberath and up to Japhia.

esv.text: From Sarid it goes in the other direction eastward toward the sunrise to the boundary of Chisloth-tabor. From there it goes to Daberath, then up to Japhia.

cnv.text: 又從撒立向東轉到日出的方向，去到吉斯綠．他泊的境界，又伸展到大比拉，上到雅非亞；

ccb.text: 从撒立向东到吉斯绿·他泊的边界，经大比拉、直到雅非亚；
